pass_summaries.summary: Implemented all required structural/craft fixes: tightened transcript drift, moved pivot pressure earlier, made route causality deadline-driven, and replaced abstract impact language with embodied consequence while preserving continuity and voice constraints.

Revised dialogue in the impound, lender-call, and wire-counter exchanges to enforce clearer idiolect separation, stronger pressure cadence, and less swappable institutional speech while preserving chapter continuity and established character register.

All three prose/copyedit findings were resolved with targeted line edits only: sensory-template repetition was reduced, impulse-control syntax was diversified, and character entrances were varied through action/dialogue-forward construction while preserving continuity and chapter voice.
